name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
New Dior Groove 20cm bag in blue calfskin oblique
This Dior Groove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, and embellished with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The bag can be opened with a zipper lock using the included key charm. The spacious compartment has a slip pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap,
Model: 8809
Size: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm
